<div class="recipe-card">
<h3><a href="https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_verify_with_outcome_grader.ipynb">Outcomes: agents that verify their own work</a></h3>
<p>Build a grade-and-revise loop with Outcomes: a writer drafts a cited research brief, a stateless grader fetches every URL and checks every quote against a rubric, and feedback drives revisions until the brief passes. Covers user.define_outcome, the span.outcome_evaluation_* events, and how to write a rubric the grader can act on.</p>
<p><strong>분류:</strong> Claude Managed Agents, Evals<br><strong>저자:</strong> markn-ant, gaganb-ant<br><strong>날짜:</strong> 2026-05-03</p>

<p>Heterogeneous team via the multiagent coordinator config — a coordinator runs three specialists (web-search researcher, file-reading librarian, rules-based pricer) with scoped toolsets to assemble a sales proposal. <p><strong>분류:</strong> Claude Managed Agents, Tools<br><strong>저자:</strong> markn-ant<br><strong>날짜:</strong> 2026-05-03</p>
